title: selaginella labordei
intro: Selaginella labordei, also known as 'False Fern', is a type of evergreen, herbaceous plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Selaginella labordei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
